top_signals.title: ECB Hike May Be Inevitable to Keep Credibility, Stournaras Says
top_signals.summary: Preserving the European Central Bank’s credibility is a strong argument in favor of an interest-rate increase next month, according to Governing Council member Yannis Stournaras.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
